name: fluxstudio-dev
description: FluxStudio development plugin for Claude Code. Provides skills for scaffolding routes, components, and tests, plus agents for drill design review and API auditing.

skills.name: scaffold-route
skills.description: Generate an Express route file following FluxStudio conventions

skills.name: scaffold-component
skills.description: Generate a React TypeScript component following FluxStudio conventions

skills.name: generate-tests
skills.description: Auto-generate tests for existing source files

skills.name: formation-review
skills.description: Review drill formation data and AI tool calls

skills.name: debug-collab
skills.description: Diagnose Yjs and WebSocket collaboration sync issues
